hero_subtitle: Join Philanthropic Project International (PPI) in making a lasting impact on health, education, and community development.
ppi_presentation: Founded in 2013, PPI is an NGO committed to improving the living conditions of disadvantaged populations in Togo. Our approach is based on community participation, transparency, and respect for human dignity.
Choose where your support goes with full: Choose where your support goes with full transparency.
Support collective initiatives in educat: Support collective initiatives in education, health, and development.
Provide direct help to children, the sic: Provide direct help to children, the sick, and people with disabilities.
projects_intro: Discover the collective actions implemented by PPI on the field. Choose a project you care about and contribute directly to improving the living conditions of the communities.
No projects available at the moment.
Your contribution directly funds the act: Your contribution directly funds the activities of this specific project.
For direct bank transfers. These details: For direct bank transfers. These details are specific to this project.
